Hero.subtitle: Find di best rates to send money go Nigeria, Philippines & 30+ countries. Compare Wise, Remitly, Western Union & more.

Corridors.title: Popular Routes for Diaspora
Corridors.subtitle: Real-time mid-market rates for di most popular money transfer routes from US.

HowItWorks.title: How E Dey Work
HowItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps to find di best deal for money transfer.
HowItWorks.step1Desc: Enter di amount and route. We go fetch live rates, fees, and speed from 8+ providers sharp sharp.
HowItWorks.step2Desc: See clear side-by-side comparison. Sort by total wey person go receive, fee, or how fast e go reach.
HowItWorks.step3Desc: Click go your provider wey you choose finish di transfer. Save up to 8x on fees.

Providers.title: Trusted Providers Wey We Dey Compare
Providers.subtitle: We dey compare rates and fees from di world top money transfer services so you no need do am yourself.

Trust.title: Trust & Security
Trust.subtitle: We be comparison platform. We no dey touch your money or personal data.
Trust.bankSecurityDesc: 256-bit SSL encryption dey protect all your data.
Trust.dataProtectedDesc: We no dey store or share your personal information.
Trust.realTimeRatesDesc: We dey fetch rates live from every provider for accuracy.
Trust.trustedByUsersDesc: Thousands of diaspora people dey rely on us every month.

Testimonials.title: Wetin Our Users Dey Talk
Testimonials.subtitle: Hear from Nigerian and Filipino diaspora members wey dey save money on every transfer.

EmailCTA.title: Get Rate Alerts for Your Route
EmailCTA.subtitle: Join 50,000+ diaspora members wey dey get di best rates for their inbox.
EmailCTA.disclaimer: Free forever. Unsubscribe anytime. No spam.

Premium.title: Save More With
Premium.subtitle: Free comparison go start you off. Pro alerts and rate predictions go make your family get more money on every transfer.
Premium.unlimitedAlertsDesc: Get notification once your route reach di rate wey you want — through SMS or email.
Premium.rateHistoryDesc: See exactly when rates dey high and low. Send at di right time, every time.
Premium.predictionsDesc: Our model dey analyze patterns and tell you if you suppose send now or wait.
Premium.apiWhiteLabelDesc: Power your app or bank with live rates. Put our widget under your brand.

Footer.description: Compare remittance rates from top providers. Find di best exchange rates, lowest fees, and fastest transfers for sending money abroad.
Footer.disclosure: 1StopRemittance dey earn commissions from partner links. Dis one no dey affect our rankings or recommendations.

Compare.title: Compare Live Rates
Compare.subtitle: Real-time comparison across 8+ major providers. We dey update am every 60 seconds.
Compare.savingsSuffix: if you compare providers and pick di right one!
Compare.disclaimer: Rates wey we show na indicative and we dey update am live — e fit change small for checkout. 1StopRemittance dey earn affiliate commissions when you click through and complete transfer. Dis one never affect di order of results — we dey rank providers by amount wey person receive.
Compare.seeHow: See how we dey make money →

NotFound.title: Page No Dey
NotFound.description: Di page wey you dey find no dey or dem don move am.
